research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Verapamil blocks both IKr (hERG) and ICaL channels; multi-current balance produces a low TdP signal in the literature despite hERG block.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: Verapamil is famous as the hERG-only-overreach refuter; competent readers DO multi-current frame this one and surface the contradiction. Citations are real but not machine-validated. No falsifier discipline.
